Our Products

Polyethylene pouches, custom orders. LDPE, HDPE, LLDPE, PP.

Product Line

Polyethylene Pouches

We produce pouches for retail, food packaging, and logistics. All made to your dimensions, thickness, and print specification.

  • Flat pouches (plain and printed)
  • Perforated pouches (single or multiple holes)
  • Microperforated pouches (food and produce)
  • Adhesive-strip pouches (standard and security seal)
  • Custom printed pouches (up to 6 colors)
  • Courier pouches (tamper-evident security seal)
Product Line

Custom Orders

We manufacture to customer specification or assist in developing one. Prototype runs are available before committing to volume.

  • Non-standard dimensions and thicknesses
  • Specific material blends or additives
  • Full-color print with your artwork
  • Prototype runs before committing to volume

Materials we work with

Standard and specialty — depending on your application.

LDPE

Flexible, general use

HDPE

Rigid, high tensile strength

PP

Clear, food-safe

LLDPE

Stretch, puncture resist

Recycled

Post-consumer blends

Custom

Your spec, our blend

Have a specific requirement?

Send an enquiry with your product parameters. We will respond with a quote or an alternative solution.

Request a Quote
